name: Jiangxi Xinyu Guoke Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Jiangxi Xinyu Guoke Technology Co., Ltd manufactures and sells military products. It offers blasting and silhouette equipment, silhouette rockets, cannonball storage devices, meteorological special technical equipment, human shadow blasting equipment, Internet of Things management systems, artificial weathering operation command platforms, special machinery and equipment, special blasting equipment, and multi-function laser raindrop spectrometers. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Xinyu, China.
